flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Sonoma State University rose 40% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.9k → $5.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Sonoma State University vs the 2004–2008 baseline (5.4k vs 7.2k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Sonoma State University rose 19% between 2007 and 2010 ($10.5k → $12.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Sonoma State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).
